name: The Office Golf Simulators at Broadway
about: The Office Golf Simulators at Broadway Pizza Rogers is a venue combining golf simulation with a full-service bar and restaurant. It features HD Golf Simulators for playing on world-famous courses, catering to golfers of all skill levels. The pricing is structured in standard, peak, and senior rate tiers, with options for hourly rentals and private event bookings. The venue is designed as an all-in-one experience for dining, socializing, and playing golf.
why_golfers_like_it: Direct food and beverage service to the simulator station
Next-level HD Golf Simulators offering a top-tier experience
Flexible pricing for different times and customer groups
Option to exclusively rent the space for private events

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen serving signature pizzas, appetizers, and food available to order at the simulator stations.
Full bar service available, with drinks able to be ordered directly to the simulator stations.

simulator_hardware.notes: Next-level simulators with detailed course graphics and ball physics.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify whether they provide club rentals, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are allowed. The venue offers its own food and beverage service, which can be ordered directly to your station.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration of an 18-hole round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not explicitly state if it is kid-friendly, but its family-oriented offerings and general atmosphere suggest it can accommodate families.
